benefits.description: Decreased usual intermittent pain on day 1; passing normal stool once a day by day 3; only mild intestinal pain since starting

protocol_notes: Currently on infliximab every 6 weeks. Diet is 90% chicken and rice. BPC-157 purchased as lyophilised powder, resuspended in bacteriostatic water. Third-party tested supplier with HPLC verification. Injecting into belly. Week 1 results reported during a pre-infusion period which is usually a period of increased symptoms. Planning to extend to 40 days then come off to observe effects. Intended use is cycles as needed.
